rationale: The Iran ceasefire deal inching closer offers a mild positive signal for energy prices, while confirmed US NATO asset cuts remain a background security concern for Poland.

top_events.title: US to cut air and naval assets deployed for NATO operations in Europe
top_events.summary: Confirmed US reduction of NATO-deployed assets directly weakens the collective defense umbrella Poland relies on, sustaining security anxiety on the eastern flank.

top_events.title: Iran says deal with US has 'never been closer'
top_events.summary: A US-Iran ceasefire/deal would ease Middle East tensions and put downward pressure on global energy prices, offering indirect relief to Polish households and businesses.

top_events.title: Musk becomes first trillionaire as SpaceX debuts on Nasdaq
top_events.summary: A major market event with limited direct impact on Poland; minor indirect signal for global investor sentiment and EU markets.
